meaning: adj.如野兽的,残忍的,令人不快的
examples: "John," he said, shuddering, "it's most beastly stuff."
We all act beastly when hurt.
Beasts are not actually all that beastly, and so we need not be either.
Patricia Hodge, as Mrs Coulter, is as beastly in khaki safari-wear as she is beguiling in full-length fox.
